heading: Shutting off water for nonpayment of operation charge
label: 495 Shutting off water for nonpayment of operation charge
text: No water shall be delivered to the lands of any water-right applicant or entryman who shall be in arrears for more than one calendar year for the payment of any charge for operation and maintenance.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of part of first sentence of section 6 of act . Remainder of first sentence of such section 6 is classified to sections 479, 493 and 494 of this title; second and third sentences of such section 6 are classified to sections 496 and 497 of this title, respectively.Aug. 13, 1914
